steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata -v
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
We are willing to support monitoring ***[Pgbouncer](https://pgbouncer.github.io/)*** with netdata.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Pgbouncer monitoring
steps.description:
Ok, guys. I've added the initial version of the PgBouncer collector. Initially, I used the python version as an example, but pretty fast realized that it had some problems and ended up reading PgBouncer-related articles, PgBcouner GitHub repo issues, and source code. The [PgBouncer
```yaml
yourjobname:
    host: "yourhost"
    user: "youradminuser" #make sure it is an admin in pgbouncer configuration
    password: "duh"
    port: "6432"
```

steps.title: Upgrade netdata to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade netdata:
```bash
# Check current version
netdata -v
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/netdata/netdata
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Pgbouncer monitoring" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Ok, guys. I've added the initial version of the PgBouncer collector. Initially, I used the python version as an example, but pretty fast realized that it had some problems and ended up reading PgBouncer-related articles, PgBcouner GitHub repo issues, and source code.
codeSnippets:
yourjobname:
    host: "yourhost"
    user: "youradminuser" #make sure it is an admin in pgbouncer configuration
    password: "duh"
    port: "6432"

prerequisites.description: A working netdata installation or development environment.
